scripts.electron:serve: wait-on tcp:4200 && npm run build:electron && electron ./electron --serve
scripts.start: npm run compile:electron && npm-run-all start:angular start:electron-serve
scripts.start:local: npm run compile && npm --prefix electron run start:local
scripts.compile: npm run compile:angular && npm run compile:electron
scripts.start:electron-serve: wait-on tcp:4200 && npm --prefix electron run start:serve
scripts.start:electron-local: npm run compile:angular && npm --prefix electron run start:local
scripts.compile-and-make: npm run build:electron && npm run build:angular-for-package && npm run forge-make
